added_content.ex_information:
Choose
TWO
letters,
A-E
.

obj.content: What are the [b] TWO [/b] main reasons why this site has been chosen for the housing development?
obj.html_content: What are the TWO main reasons why this site has been chosen for the housing development?
It has suitable geographical features.

obj.content: There is easy access to local facilities.
obj.html_content: There is easy access to local facilities.

obj.content: It has good connections with the airport.
obj.html_content: It has good connections with the airport.

obj.content: The land is of little agricultural value.
obj.html_content: The land is of little agricultural value.

obj.content: It will be convenient for workers.
obj.html_content: It will be convenient for workers.

sentence.content: Hello everyone. It’s good to see that so many members of the public have shown up for our presentation on the new housing development planned on the outskirts of Nunston.
sentence.content_zh: 大家好。很高兴看到这么多公众成员参加我们有关Nunston郊区新住宅开发计划的演示。

sentence.content: I’m Mark Reynolds and I’m Communications Manager at the development.
sentence.content_zh: 我是马克·雷诺兹，负责该项目的传媒经理。

sentence.content: I’ll start by giving you a brief overview of our plans for the development.
sentence.content_zh: 我首先会简要概述我们对该开发计划的计划。

sentence.content: So one thing I’m sure you’ll want to know is why we’ve selected this particular site for a housing development.
sentence.content_zh: 所以我相信你们中的许多人都想知道为什么我们选择了这个特定的用于住宅开发的地点。

sentence.content: At present it’s being used for farming, like much of the land around Nunston.
sentence.content_zh: 目前，它被用于农业，就像Nunston周围的大部分土地一样。

sentence.content: But because of the new industrial centre in Nunston, there’s a lot of demand for housing for employees in the region, as many employees are having to commute long distances at present.
sentence.content_zh: 但由于Nunston的新工业中心，该地区对员工住房的需求很大，因为许多员工目前不得不长途通勤。

sentence.content: Of course, there’s also the fact that we have an international airport just 20 minutes’ drive away, but although that’s certainly convenient, it wasn’t one of our major criteria for choosing the site.
sentence.content_zh: 当然，我们有一个国际机场距离这里只有20分钟的车程，虽然这无疑很方便，但这并不是我们选择该地点的主要标准之一。

sentence.content: We were more interested in the fact that there’s an excellent hospital just 15 kilometres away, and a large secondary school even closer than that.
sentence.content_zh: 我们更关注的是附近有一个优秀的医院，距离仅15公里，以及更近的一所大型中学。

sentence.content: One drawback to the site is that it’s on quite a steep slope, but we’ve taken account of that in our planning so it shouldn’t be a major problem.
sentence.content_zh: 该地点的一个缺点是地势相当陡峭，但我们在规划中已经考虑到这一点，所以不应该是一个主要问题。

sentence.content: We’ve had a lot of positive feedback about the plans.
sentence.content_zh: 关于这些计划，我们得到了很多积极的反馈。

sentence.content: People like the wide variety of accommodation types and prices, and the fact that it’s only a short drive to get out into the countryside from the development.
sentence.content_zh: 人们喜欢各种类型和价格的住宿选择，而且从该开发区到乡村只需要短暂的车程，这也是一个优势。

sentence.content: We were particularly pleased that so many people liked the designs for the layout of the development, with the majority of people saying it generally made a good impression and blended in well with the natural features of the landscape, with provision made for protecting trees and wildlife on the site.
sentence.content_zh: 我们特别高兴看到这么多人喜欢开发区的布局设计，大多数人表示总体给人良好的印象，并且与自然景观的特点融合得很好，还考虑到了保护该地点上的树木和野生动物。

sentence.content: Some people have mentioned that they’d like to see more facilities for cyclists, and we’ll look at that, but the overall feedback has been that the design and facilities of the development make it seem a place where people of all ages can live together happily.
sentence.content_zh: 有些人提到希望看到更多的自行车设施，我们会考虑这一点，但总体反馈是开发区的设计和设施使其成为一个各个年龄段的人们可以愉快共同生活的地方。

sentence.content: OK. So I’ll put a map of the proposed development up on the screen.
sentence.content_zh: 好的。现在，我将在屏幕上展示一个拟议开发区的地图。

sentence.content: You’ll see it’s bounded on the south side by the main road, which then goes on to Nunston.
sentence.content_zh: 你会看到南侧是主干道，然后通往Nunston。

sentence.content: Another boundary is formed by London Road, on the western side of the development.
sentence.content_zh: 另一条边界是由伦敦路形成的，位于开发区的西侧。

sentence.content: Inside the development there’ll be about 400 houses and 3 apartment blocks.
sentence.content_zh: 在开发区内将建造约400所房屋和3个公寓楼。

sentence.content: There’ll also be a school for children up to 11 years old.
sentence.content_zh: 还将建立一所供11岁以下儿童上学的学校。

sentence.content: If you look at the South Entrance at the bottom of the map, there’s a road from there that goes right up through the development.
sentence.content_zh: 如果你看一下地图底部的南入口，那里有一条从那里直通开发区的道路。

sentence.content: The school will be on that road, at the corner of the second turning to the left.
sentence.content_zh: 学校将位于该道路上，靠左拐的第二个转弯处的角落。

sentence.content: A large sports centre is planned with facilities for indoor and outdoor activities.
sentence.content_zh: 计划建立一个设有室内外活动设施的大型运动中心。

sentence.content: This will be on the western side of the development, just below the road that branches off from London Road.
sentence.content_zh: 它将位于开发区的西侧，紧靠从伦敦路分支出的道路下方。

sentence.content: There’ll be a clinic where residents can go if they have any health problems.
sentence.content_zh: 还将设有一所诊所，供居民前往解决健康问题。

sentence.content: Can you see the lake towards the top of the map?
sentence.content_zh: 你能看到地图顶部附近的湖吗？

sentence.content: The clinic will be just below this, to the right of a street of houses.
sentence.content_zh: 诊所将位于此处，位于一条街的房屋右侧。

sentence.content: There’ll also be a community centre for people of all ages.
sentence.content_zh: 还将设有一个面向各个年龄段的居民的社区中心。

sentence.content: On the northeast side of the development, there’ll be a row of specially designed houses specifically for residents over 65, and the community centre will be adjoining this.
sentence.content_zh: 在开发区的东北侧，将有一排专为65岁以上居民设计的房屋，社区中心将与此相邻。

sentence.content: We haven’t forgotten about shopping.
sentence.content_zh: 我们没有忘记购物需求。

sentence.content: There’ll be a supermarket between the two entrances to the development.
sentence.content_zh: 在开发区的两个入口之间将设有一家超市。

sentence.content: We’re planning to leave the three large trees near London Road, and it’ll be just to the south of these.
sentence.content_zh: 我们计划保留伦敦路附近的三棵大树，超市将位于这些树的南侧。

sentence.content: It’s planned to have a playground for younger children.
sentence.content_zh: 计划设有一个供年幼儿童玩耍的游乐场。

sentence.content: If you look at the road that goes up from the South Entrance, you’ll see it curves round to the left at the top, and the playground will be in that curve, with nice views of the lake.
sentence.content_zh: 如果你看一下从南入口起上升的道路，你会看到它在顶部向左弯曲，而游乐场将位于那个弯曲处，可以欣赏到湖的美景。

sentence.content: OK, so now does anyone …
sentence.content_zh: 好了，现在有人...

added_content.ex_information:
Choose
TWO
letters,
A-E
.

obj.content: Which [b] TWO [/b] aspects of the planned housing development have people given positive feedback about?
obj.html_content: Which TWO aspects of the planned housing development have people given positive feedback about?
the facilities for cyclists
the impact on the environment

obj.content: the encouragement of good relations between residents
obj.html_content: the encouragement of good relations between residents

obj.content: the low cost of all the accommodation
obj.html_content: the low cost of all the accommodation
the rural location

sentence.content: OK, so now does anyone …
sentence.content_zh: 好了，现在有人...

officialExplain.explain: 根据题干可知需要选择选址的原因。原文中的…why we’ve selected this particular site…提示答案即将出现。随后首先出现D选项中agricultural一词的同义替换farming，提到此地目前还是农耕用地，但未提及“几乎没有农耕价值”。随后的转折词But引出另一个原因，即工业园区的员工需要住房，因为目前通勤距离太远。employees替换E选项的workers，E选项中convenient一词需要整体理解原文答案句，即新建住房能让员工通勤距离变短，从而为其提供便利。下一句also一词提示另一个优点，即距离airport很近，C选项原词重现。但后文转折后予以否定，即it wasn’t one of our major criteria for choosing this site，故排除C选项。接下来，We were more interested in…引出更重要的原因，即距离医院和学校很近，对应B选项的easy access to local facilities，需要考生熟悉hospital和school的上义词替换facilities。最后原文提及房屋建在斜坡上，对应A选项的geographical features，但此处为缺点，而并非选址理由，故排除A选项。

本题需选出人们对这一新建住宅区给出的积极评价。题干的positive feedback原词重现。首先提到人们喜欢the wide variety of accommodation types and prices，即多样的种类和价格选择，可否定D选项。and后引出另一个原因，countryside对应E选项的rural，但并非住宅区位于乡村，而是距离乡村有很短的车程，因此排除E选项。接着提到人们喜欢住宅区的布局设计，随后提到…blended in well with the natural features of the landscape，其中的natural features对应B选项的environment，可初步确定B选项正确，原文紧接着提到protecting trees and wildlife…也和环保相关，可进一步确认B选项为正确选项之一。下一句中A选项的facilities for cyclists原词重现，但we’ll look at that表示将来会考虑，即目前还没有，故排除A选项。but后引出另一条反馈，即people of all ages can live together happily，对应C选项的good relations between residents，因此C选项为另一个正确选项。
